title: Product Comparison Table Template
scenario: Create a template for a product comparison table that includes features like processor speed, RAM, storage, and price. The table should have columns for each feature and rows for each product. The LLM output should be in Markdown format, with at least 5 rows and columns, and must use headers, tables for proper alignment, and use proper Markdown syntax.
constraints: Must include a header row with feature names
Each product row must have at least 5 data points

evaluationCriteria.description: The LLM output must adhere to proper Markdown syntax for tables
The LLM output must have at least 5 rows and 5 columns with proper data points
The header row must have the correct feature names
The LLM output must be at most 200 words
